creator: Lars_Koeller@odie.physik2.uni-rostock.de
text:
Update of nas port to the last version nas-1.2.4. Some of the patches
   are already includes, so that only 2 remind.

Fix: Unpack the uuencoded  file and  replace  the old nas port.  Check if
   compileable on -current. I only test it on 2.1.5-R. 




--
________________________________________________________________________
